title.en: And it was so surprised that it didn't even kil...

content.en:
Destroying creatures is not very intelligent, but that doesn't mean they don't have any intelligence at all.

Although their minds were full of killing and destruction, the Heavenly Venerable-level destruction creatures also knew the difference between strength and weakness, and Ye Tian was obviously an ant in its eyes.

And it was so surprised that it didn't even kill a single ant with one blow.

"Sure enough, one blow of a Tianzun-level destructive creature can't kill me, there is a sea of death flowers, and I can't die at all!"

Ye Tian said confidently.

Of course, his attack couldn't kill the Celestial-level creatures, not even heavy damage.

But he could completely contain this Heavenly Venerable-level creature, and let Aurora and the other sons of the era control the Heavenly Venerable-level puppets to attack the Heavenly Venerable-level destructive creatures.

Because at present, only Tianzun-level puppets have the possibility of killing Tianzun-level destructive creatures.

"You control the Heavenly Venerable-level puppet to attack with all your might, and I continue to interfere and contain this Celestial-level destructive creature!"

Ye Tian said.

"Good!"

Aurora and the others nodded again and again.

Without Ye Tian's assistance, the Tianzun-level puppets would not be able to compete with the Tianzun-level destructive creatures at all, otherwise they would be destroyed after too long.

But with Ye Tian's interference, the situation was completely different.

They might really have the potential to kill or suppress this Celestial-level destructive creature.

Swish!

Ye Tian made a move.

He constantly attacked the eyes of the Celestial-level Destroyer, so that he could hurt the Celestial-Elemental-level Destroyer to the greatest extent.

At the beginning, this Tianzun-level destructive creature didn't care about Ye Tian, but after being injured by Ye Tian many times, he was immediately annoyed, and no longer cared about the Tianzun-level puppet, but vowed to kill Ye Tian.

But Ye Tian's recovery speed is too fast, and he can transfer damage, so he is not afraid of its attack at all.

And when it attacked Ye Tian with all its might, the Tianzun-level puppet used a big move to bombard it, causing it very serious damage.

In this way, Ye Tian cooperated with the Tianzun-level puppet to gradually suppress the Tianzun-level destructive creature, and made the injuries of this Tianzun-level destructive creature more and more serious.

If it was a normal Tianzun-level powerhouse, he would definitely find a way to escape if he fell into a disadvantage, but the Tianzun-level destructive creature did not have the idea of escaping at all.

They only have destruction and killing in their minds, and even if they encounter a strong person, they will not escape, just like a bunch of cosmic god-level destruction creatures dare to besiege the Supreme.

Therefore, even if the Heavenly Venerable-level destructive creature in front of him was at a disadvantage, it would not escape, but would only become more crazy.

In the blink of an eye, three days have passed.

Ye Tian and the Heavenly Venerable-level puppet attacked this Heavenly Venerable-level destructive creature for three days, and during these three days, occasionally a few Dominant-level people came over, but they didn't dare to approach at all, but fled from here.

Obviously, not everyone had the guts of Ye Tian to dare to stand up to the Heavenly Venerable-level destructive creatures.

"It's been three days, and I still can't kill this Heavenly Venerable-level destructive creature, and it's only slightly injured, if it goes on like this, it's very difficult to kill this Tianzun-level destructive creature!"

Ye Tian frowned.

He knew very well that it was difficult for a destructive creature to kill, but the difficulty of killing a Heavenly Venerable-level destructive creature was somewhat beyond his imagination.

If he continued to fight, he and the Tianzun-level puppet were confident that they would consume this Tianzun-level destructive creature.

But now, there are more and more cracks on the body of the Tianzun-level puppet, and they can't last long, and there is no way to repair the Tianzun-level puppet during the battle.

"What other hole cards do you have, the treasure that can hurt this Tianzun-level destructive creature, otherwise once the Tianzun-level puppet is destroyed, you will all die, and I can escape!"

Ye Tian sent a message to Aurora and the others.

In an instant, the faces of the sons of the Aurora and other eras changed.

Ye Tian was right, Ye Tian could escape, because he could resist the attacks of the Heavenly Venerable-level destructive creatures, but they couldn't escape.

They didn't have Ye Tian's ability, they could hardly shake the Heavenly Venerable level to destroy creatures.

Once the Celestial-level puppets are destroyed, they are finished.

I saw that the faces of the children of the era changed many times, and after about a few minutes.

Aurora said: "Ten Thousand Law Divine Lord, we do still have some treasures in our hands, which can hurt the Heavenly Venerable-level destructive creatures, which were given to us by the Supremes, so that we can survive this turmoil." However, we can't guarantee that we will be able to use these treasures to kill the Celestial-level Destruction Creature!"

"Either way, give it a try!"

Ye Tiandao.

"Okay!" Aurora and the others nodded, and then said, "Ten Thousand Law Divine Lord, prevent this Heavenly Venerable-level destructive creature from dodging our attacks, and please use the power of time and space to suppress it temporarily." "

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

Immediately, Aurora and the others took out one secret treasure after another.

Some are spells, sealed with terrifying power, and some are self-detonating type secret treasures, which are enough to hurt Tianzun-level destructive creatures, but they are also easy to hurt themselves.

Fortunately, they formed a formation, and they had Tianzun-level puppets as a resistant, so they would not be blown up to death by their own secret treasures.

Boom Boom Boom !!

One by one, the secret treasures were sacrificed one after another, and several of the secret treasures even caused Ye Tiandu to have a crisis, which showed the strength of his secret treasures.

In a flash.

The terrifying sound of the explosion resounded through the starry sky, and the Celestial-level destructive creatures were completely submerged in the explosion.

Soon, the fluctuations dissipated.

Everyone's faces changed, and they saw that the Heavenly Venerable-level destructive creature was still not dead, but it was covered in blood, obviously seriously injured.

"Are there any hole cards?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Yes!" A son of the era named River of Fire took out a fireball and said, "This is the Nine Heavens Hellfire, which can incinerate everything, and is sealed in this fireball, but I don't dare to release it, otherwise I won't be able to hurt the Heavenly Venerable level of the destructive creature, but will kill myself." "

"Give it to me!"

Ye Tiandao.

Huohe hurriedly said: "Ten Thousand Law Divine Lord, according to my estimate, even with the Nine Heavens Hellfire, it will be difficult to kill this Heavenly Venerable-level destructive creature, its defense is too terrifying, and the skin on its body seems to be able to counteract many energy attacks. "

"What if the Nine Heavens Hellfire is detonated inside a Heavenly Venerable-level Destruction Being?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Then we might be able to kill the Celestial-level destructive creatures!" Aurora said.

"Okay, then detonate the Nine Heavens Flame from within!"

Ye Tiandao.

Immediately, Ye Tian took out the Nine Heavens Immortal Fire and rushed towards the Tianzun-level destructive creature, but in the shocked eyes of everyone, Ye Tian directly rushed into the mouth of the Tianzun-level destructive creature.

"This ...... He's crazy, he's going to die too!"

Aurora and the others were shocked.

When Ye Tian entered the mouth of the Heavenly Venerable-level Destruction Creature, a terrifying explosion sounded.

Bang!!!!

The Heavenly Venerable-level destructive creature was detonated from its body by the Nine Heavens Immortal Fire, and its entire body was almost about to burst.

Death is at hand.

The Heavenly Venerable-level Destruction Creature tried its best to suppress the energy explosion in its body, but it couldn't stop it at all.

Instead, let its energy collide with the Nine Heavens Hellfire energy in its body, and it was about to produce a second explosion, and this time it skyrocketed even more than the first explosion.

"It's not good, run away!"

Aurora realized that something was wrong and hurriedly said.

The other sons of the era also saw it, and flew away one by one, even leaving the Tianzun-level puppets here, trying to resist the shock wave.

When the Sons of Anno didn't fly far, a terrifying explosion rang out.

Rumble!!!!

Countless spaces were annihilated, and these sons of the era tried their best to defend themselves, but they were also shocked and flew away, and each of them was seriously injured.
